title: History of the Peloponnesian War, Volume II

summary: A Scaife-backed parallel-text shelf for History of the Peloponnesian War, Volume II. History of the Peloponnesian War, Volume II currently opens the full Scaife work because the exact Loeb volume split is not encoded in the request line.
